title: malus sieversii
intro: Malus sieversii, also known as the wild apple or Tien Shan apple, is a species of apple tree native to Central Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Malus sieversii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Malus sieversii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat.
